description: Push HTML prototypes to DesignPin for team review and pull reviewer feedback into your AI.
name: io.github.opjhabuilds/designpin-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: DesignPin project-scoped API key. Generate at https://designpin.pro under Project Settings. Required for uploadVersion and listComments tools; not required for createShareLink.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNPIN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Firestore project document ID the API key is scoped to. Required when using uploadVersion or listComments.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNPIN_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://designpin.pro. Override only for testing against a staging or alternate host.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNPIN_BASE_URL
